svg.title: SafeRoute AI — End-to-end request flow
svg.desc: Flowchart showing how a user's navigation request flows through the app, FastAPI backend, safety scorer, route engine, and back to the map, with a parallel SOS emergency path.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens when the user enters a destination in SafeRoute?')
sendPrompt('What does the FastAPI backend do when it receives a route request?')
sendPrompt('How is OSMnx used to fetch street and lighting data?')
sendPrompt('Where does the crime density data come from?')
sendPrompt('How are user crowd reports ingested?')
sendPrompt('Explain the Safety Score formula S = w1C + w2L + w3P + w4R')
g.text: S = w₁(C) + w₂(L) + w₃(P) + w₄(R) per road segment

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does NetworkX compute the safety-weighted optimal route?')
sendPrompt('How is the safest route displayed to the user on the map?')
sendPrompt('What happens during active navigation monitoring?')
g.text: GPS deviation, crowd pings, SOS watch
